questions.question: Select the most appropriate Antonym of the given word. The fractured bone took months to heal properly.
questions.explanation: B) Fractured(adjective) – broken, divided, fragmented, split, inconsistent खंडित Antonym: United(adjective) – Joined together, integrated, whole. (एकजुट) Divided(adjective) – Separated, split. (विभाजित) Inconsistent(adjective) – Irregular, erratic. (असंगत) Split(adjective) – Divided, broken. (टूटा हुआ)

questions.question: Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute to fill in the blanks for the given group of highlighted words. _______________ is a narrow passage of water connecting two seas or two other large areas of water
questions.explanation: D)Strait(noun) – A narrow passage of water connecting two seas or two other large areas of water जलडमरूमध्य Peninsula(noun) – A piece of land almost surrounded by water or projecting out into a body of water. प्रायद्वीप Embankment(noun) – A wall or bank of earth or stone built to prevent a river flooding an area. तटबंध Gorge(noun) – A narrow valley between hills or mountains, typically with steep rocky walls and a stream running through it. खड्ड

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning of the underlined word in the context of the following sentence. We should go to the Himalayas this spring
questions.explanation: C) यहाँ'spring'का अर्थ 'एक ऋतु' (A season) है, क्योंकि वाक्य में ‘Himalayas’ और ‘this spring’ का संदर्भ दिया गया है। ‘spring’ यहाँ वर्ष के एक समय को दर्शाता है, जो कि वसंत ऋतु है। The word 'spring' here refers to 'a season' (C. A season) because the sentence mentions the Himalayas and 'this spring,' indicating a time of the year, specifically the spring season

questions.question: Select the most appropriate Antonym of the given word. Proper alignment between departments ensures smooth workflow and better productivity.
questions.explanation: B) Alignment(noun) – coordination, conformity, arrangement, harmony, adjustment मेल Antonym: Disagreement(noun) – Conflict, discord, opposition (मतभेद) Coordination(noun) – Synchronization, organization, teamwork (समन्वय) Harmony(noun) – Agreement, unity, concord (सामंजस्य) Adjustment(noun) – Adaptation, modification, regulation (समायोजन)

questions.question: Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph. A) According to estimates, 12 to 16 million tonnes of foodgrains are lost every year in the country, enough to feed one-third of India’s poor. B) Despite losses spanning decades, only limited attempts have been made to invest in scientifically-sound storage systems. C) The sight of grain stocks rotting in the open is not only acutely distressing, but also absurd for what it represents in this time and age — a callous, uncaring, unscientific approach to perhaps the most vital component of the region’s economy. D) Media reports of overflowing grain markets forcing farmers to unload their wheat stock at a cremation ground in a Rohtak village sum up the bizarre scenario.
questions.explanation: D) CDAB C:This sentence sets the scene and introduces the problem: grains are rotting, and the issue is attributed to an uncaring and unscientific approach. D:This sentence provides a specific example of the broader issue introduced in sentence C. It illustrates the absurdity of the situation, reinforcing the distressing situation that has been pointed out. A:This sentence gives statistical data to reinforce the gravity of the problem described in sentences C and D. It presents the scale of the issue and its potential impact on the poor population.B:Finally, this sentence offers a critique of the situation and indicates a potential solution — investing in scientifically-sound storage systems. The word "Despite" suggests that this sentence follows information about the problem.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank. The sharpshooter _________ dead a man-eating tiger after it allegedly killed nine people in the last few days.
questions.explanation: C) ‘Shot'का use होगा क्योंकि इसका अर्थ है बंदूक से गोली चलाना और किसी लक्ष्य को मारना, जो सही है जहां एक sharpshooter का जिक्र है जिसने एक नरभक्षी बाघ को मार गिराया। वाक्य में स्पष्ट रूप से sharpshooter और एक विशिष्ट कार्रवाई का उल्लेख है, इसलिए 'shot' सही answer है। जबकि: 'Killed' का अर्थ है मौत का कारण बनना, लेकिन यह स्पष्ट नहीं करता कि कार्रवाई कैसे की गई। वाक्य में sharpshooter के संदर्भ में कार्रवाई को विशेष रूप से दर्शाने की आवश्यकता है, जो 'shot' से संबंधित है। 'Threw' का अर्थ है किसी वस्तु को बलपूर्वक हवा में फेंकना, जो बंदूक का use करने के संदर्भ में irrelevant है। 'Fixed' का अर्थ है मरम्मत करना या स्थिर करना, जो बाघ को गोली मारने के संदर्भ में बिल्कुल भी उपयुक्त नहीं है। Shot'will be used because it means to fire a bullet from a gun to hit a target, which aligns perfectly with the context where a sharpshooter is involved in taking down a man-eating tiger. The sentence explicitly mentions the sharpshooter and an action to deal with the tiger, making 'shot' the most suitable option. Whereas: 'Killed' means to cause death but does not specify how the action was performed, and the sentence requires the use of an action involving a sharpshooter, which is specifically related to shooting. 'Threw' means to propel something with force through the air, which is irrelevant in the context of using a gun. 'Fixed' means to repair or fasten, which has no connection to the context of shooting or dealing with a tiger.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word. Clean water is indispensable for survival, making its conservation a global priority.
questions.explanation: A) Indispensable(adjective) – essential, crucial, necessary, vital, mandatory अनिवार्य Synonym: Essential(adjective) – Crucial, vital, necessary. आवश्यक Optional(adjective) – Not compulsory, voluntary. वैकल्पिक Replaceable(adjective) – Can be substituted. प्रतिस्थाप्य Unnecessary(adjective) – Not needed. अनावश्यक

questions.question: Select the INCORRECTLY spelt word
questions.explanation: C) The correct spelling of ‘Supperannuation’is ‘Superannuation’which means “the payment given upon retirement from a fund or pension plan.” अवकाश प्राप्ति पर निधि का भुगतान.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to complete the given sentence in the present perfect continuous tense. The company ___________________ working towards achievements in curbing slackness and fostering development
questions.explanation: C) ‘Has been" का use किया जाएगा क्योंकि यह present perfect continuous tense बनाने के लिए use होता है, जिसमें has/have been और verb के -ing रूप का use किया जाता है। इस वाक्य में subject "The company" singular है, इसलिए "has been" यहाँ सही है। "Have been" का use plural subjects के साथ होता है, लेकिन यहाँ subject singular है, इसलिए यह गलत है। "Are being" present continuous tense और passive voice दर्शाता है, लेकिन यहाँ sentence active voice में है। "Is being" भी singular subjects के साथ passive voice के लिए use होता है, लेकिन वाक्य active voice में है। Has been" will be used because it is used to form the present perfect continuous tense, combining "has/have been" with the -ing form of the verb. In this sentence, the subject "The company" is singular, making "has been" correct. Have been" is used with plural subjects, but the subject here is singular, so it is incorrect. "Are being" denotes present continuous tense in the passive voice, but the sentence is in active voice.n"Is being" is also used for singular subjects in passive voice, which doesn't fit this context

questions.question: Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word. The company announced a major overhaul of its policies to improve employee satisfaction.
questions.explanation: A) Overhaul(noun) – reform, renovation, restructuring, transformation, revamp सुधार / पुनर्गठन Synonym: Revamp(noun) – Restructuring, renewal, makeover. नवीनीकरण Hatred(noun) – Loathing, dislike, animosity (घृणा) Aggression(noun) – Hostility, violence, attack (आक्रमण) Enmity(noun) – Hostility, animosity, antagonism (दुश्मनी)

questions.question: Select the INCORRECTLY spelt word.
questions.explanation: B) The correct spelling of ‘Concieve’is ‘Conceive’which means “to form or devise (a plan or idea) in the mind” कल्पना करना.

questions.question: Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words. The new movie became something that is striking or has great popular appeal, attracting huge crowds to the theaters within its first week of release.
questions.explanation: C)Showstopper(noun) – something that is striking or has great popular appeal.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word. Standing at the hilltop, we admired the breathtaking vista of the valley below.
questions.explanation: A) Vista(noun) – prospect, view, opportunity, vision, outlook दृश्य / संभावना Synonym: Opportunity(noun) – Chance, prospect. अवसर Obstacle(noun) – Barrier, hindrance. बाधा Problematic(adjective) – Troublesome, difficult. (समस्यात्मक) Blur(noun) – Unclear vision, haze. धुंधलापन

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom. Through thick and thin
options: To pass through thick and thin air
To possess both thick and thin clothes
To travel through thick and thin clouds
To be supportive in both good and bad times
questions.explanation: D)Through thick and thin(idiom) – To be supportive in both good and bad times अच्छे और बुरे समय में सहायक रहना

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option that can substitute the underlined segment in the given sentence. A raven, which you know is black as coal, was envious of the swan, because her feathers are as white as the purest snow
questions.explanation: C) 'feathers are as white as' के बदले'feathers were as white as'का use होगा क्योंकि मुख्य वाक्य में verb 'was' Past Tense में है अतः इससे संबंधित Dependent Clause में भी Verb Past Tense में होनी चाहिए; जैसे—A raven, which you know is black as coal, was envious of the swan, because her feathers were as white as the purest snow. •'feathers were as white as'will be used instead of 'feathers are as white as' because the main sentence uses the verb 'was' in Past Tense, so the dependent clause related to it should also use the verb in Past Tense; Like— A raven, which you know is black as coal, was envious of the swan, because her feathers were as white as the purest snow.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate idiom that can substitute the underlined segment in the given sentence. Mary appeared for the test. She was waiting anxiously for the test result.
options: hitting the nail on the head
questions.explanation: D)On pins and needles– Waiting anxiously किसी परिणाम या घटना का बेसब्री और बेचैनी से इंतजार करना।

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom. Hanging by a thread.
options: To be perilously close to failing, dying, or resulting in a bad outcome
questions.explanation: B)Hanging by a thread(idiom) – To be perilously close to failing, dying, or resulting in a bad outcome. किसी चीज़ का विफलता, मृत्यु, या किसी बुरे परिणाम के बेहद करीब होना।

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. Parts of northern France were also (A) / put in drought alert, with (B) / water supplies to businesses, (C) / farmers and ordinary residents restricted. (D)
options: Parts of northern France were also
questions.explanation: B) 'put in' के बदले'put on'का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि 'alert' के साथ preposition 'on' का प्रयोग होता है; जैसे— The city was put on high alert due to the storm warning. 'put on'will be used instead of 'put in' because the preposition 'on' is used with 'alert'; Like— The city was put on high alert due to the storm warning.

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. Despite of the burst of interest in caps and (A) / bucket hats recently, the concept of (B) / a more decorative designer hat hasn’t (C) / looked this likely to take off in years. (D)
options: Despite of the burst of interest in caps and
bucket hats recently, the concept of
a more decorative designer hat hasn’t
looked this likely to take off in years
questions.explanation: A) 'Despite of' के बदले 'Despite' का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि 'Despite' एक Preposition है जिसके साथ 'of' का प्रयोग नहीं होता है; जैसे— Despite the rain, we went out. 'Despite' will be used instead of 'Despite of' because 'Despite' is a preposition and 'of' is not used with it; Like— Despite the rain, we went out.

questions.question: Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph. A) Colombo could have done without getting caught in strategic rivalry. B) From the outset, it made little sense for the Chinese to send a spy ship to Sri Lanka when the country was reeling under its worst-ever economic crises. C) It was chicanery on Beijing’s part to have sought permission from a dying regime for a ‘research ship’ — which spies on a country’s coastal defences on the side — to dock at Hambantota. D) The Presidential Palace in Colombo was about to be stormed and President Gotabaya Rakapaksa was literally packing his bags.
questions.explanation: A) BACD B:This sentence sets the scene and context for the rest of the paragraph. It introduces the topic - the ill-timed dispatch of a Chinese spy ship to Sri Lanka during a time of crisis. A:Following on from the previous sentence, this one continues the idea that Sri Lanka (represented by its capital, Colombo) would have been better off without the complications of strategic rivalry during this time. C:This sentence adds detail about the ship's alleged purpose and Beijing's motives, calling it "chicanery". It also further develops the argument started in Sentence A and deepens the narrative of the complex geopolitical situation D:This sentence provides more context on the crisis in Sri Lanka, reinforcing why the decision of sending a spy ship was ill-timed. The phrase"a dying regime"from Sentence C directly leads to this description of the political situation, making Sentence D a logical conclusion

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. The _____1_____death by suicide of at least seven students, six of them girls, in different parts of Telangana after the declaration of intermediate (equivalent of Classes XI and XII) results is another ____2_____reminder that despite several progressive interventions in recent years, much work needs to be done to _____3_____ the anxieties of the country’s youth. The Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education had arranged for counsellors for students in junior colleges to _____4_____ exam-related stress. State government representatives had also asked students to not be ____5_____by adverse results and make use of the supplementary examinations. However, the loss of young lives speaks of serious systemic shortcomings that cannot be mitigated by reaching out to students just before the examinations Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 1.
questions.explanation: D) 'Alleged' का use होगा क्योंकि "alleged" का अर्थ होता है कुछ ऐसा जो कहा जाता है परन्तु इसकी पुष्टि नहीं हुई हो। यहाँ पर, छात्रों की मौत की वजह से समस्या की गंभीरता और अनिश्चितता को दर्शाने के लिए 'alleged' शब्द का प्रयोग हुआ है। 'Abjured' का अर्थ है त्यागना या इनकार करना, 'Denied' का अर्थ है अस्वीकार करना, और 'Prolonged' का अर्थ है दीर्घकालिक, जो कि इस context में सही नहीं हैं। 'Alleged' will be used because it means something claimed but not proven. In this context, the word 'alleged' is used to indicate the gravity and uncertainty of the problem regarding the students' deaths. Whereas, 'Abjured' means to renounce or reject, 'Denied' means to refuse acknowledgment, and 'Prolonged' means extended in time, which are not appropriate here.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. The _____1_____death by suicide of at least seven students, six of them girls, in different parts of Telangana after the declaration of intermediate (equivalent of Classes XI and XII) results is another ____2_____reminder that despite several progressive interventions in recent years, much work needs to be done to _____3_____ the anxieties of the country’s youth. The Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education had arranged for counsellors for students in junior colleges to _____4_____ exam-related stress. State government representatives had also asked students to not be ____5_____by adverse results and make use of the supplementary examinations. However, the loss of young lives speaks of serious systemic shortcomings that cannot be mitigated by reaching out to students just before the examinations Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 2.
questions.explanation: C) 'Grim' का use होगा क्योंकि "grim" का अर्थ होता है कुछ गंभीर या दुखद। यहाँ पर, छात्रों की मौत को एक गंभीर याद दिलाने के रूप में दर्शाया गया है, जो कि समस्या की गंभीरता को उजागर करता है। 'Proclaim' का अर्थ है घोषणा करना, 'Claim' का अर्थ है दावा करना, और 'Generous' का अर्थ है उदार, जो कि इस context में सही नहीं हैं। 'Grim' will be used because it means something serious or sorrowful. Here, the students' deaths are described as a grim reminder, highlighting the severity of the issue. Whereas, 'Proclaim' means to declare officially, 'Claim' means to state as a fact, and 'Generous' means showing a readiness to give more of something, none of which fit in this context

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. The _____1_____death by suicide of at least seven students, six of them girls, in different parts of Telangana after the declaration of intermediate (equivalent of Classes XI and XII) results is another ____2_____reminder that despite several progressive interventions in recent years, much work needs to be done to _____3_____ the anxieties of the country’s youth. The Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education had arranged for counsellors for students in junior colleges to _____4_____ exam-related stress. State government representatives had also asked students to not be ____5_____by adverse results and make use of the supplementary examinations. However, the loss of young lives speaks of serious systemic shortcomings that cannot be mitigated by reaching out to students just before the examinations Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 3.
questions.explanation: A) 'Alleviate' का use होगा क्योंकि "alleviate" का अर्थ होता है किसी पीड़ा या बोझ को कम करना। यहाँ पर, छात्रों की चिंताओं को कम करने की बात की गई है, इसलिए 'alleviate' यहाँ सही है। 'Initiate' का अर्थ है शुरू करना, 'Associate' का अर्थ है जोड़ना या संबंधित करना, और 'Depreciate' का अर्थ है मूल्यह्रास, जो इस context में सही नहीं हैं। 'Alleviate' will be used because it means to make suffering or a burden less severe. Here, the context discusses reducing the anxieties of the youth, making 'alleviate' the appropriate choice. Whereas, 'Initiate' means to begin, 'Associate' means to connect or relate, and 'Depreciate' means to decrease in value, which do not fit in this context

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. The _____1_____death by suicide of at least seven students, six of them girls, in different parts of Telangana after the declaration of intermediate (equivalent of Classes XI and XII) results is another ____2_____reminder that despite several progressive interventions in recent years, much work needs to be done to _____3_____ the anxieties of the country’s youth. The Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education had arranged for counsellors for students in junior colleges to _____4_____ exam-related stress. State government representatives had also asked students to not be ____5_____by adverse results and make use of the supplementary examinations. However, the loss of young lives speaks of serious systemic shortcomings that cannot be mitigated by reaching out to students just before the examinations Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 4
questions.explanation: A) deal with' का use होगा क्योंकि "deal with" का अर्थ होता है किसी समस्या या मुद्दे का सामना करना और उसे हल करना। यहाँ पर, छात्रों की परीक्षा संबंधी तनाव को संभालने की बात की गई है, इसलिए 'deal with' यहाँ सही है। 'Pace with' का अर्थ है किसी चीज़ के साथ बराबरी करना, 'firm up' का अर्थ है मजबूत या स्थिर करना, और 'carry out' का अर्थ है किसी कार्य को अंजाम देना, जो इस context में सही नहीं हैं। 'deal with' will be used because it means to handle and address a problem or issue. In this context, it refers to managing exam-related stress among students, making 'deal with' the appropriate choice. Whereas, 'pace with' means to keep up with something, 'firm up' means to make something more secure or definite, and 'carry out' means to execute a task, which do not fit in this context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. The _____1_____death by suicide of at least seven students, six of them girls, in different parts of Telangana after the declaration of intermediate (equivalent of Classes XI and XII) results is another ____2_____reminder that despite several progressive interventions in recent years, much work needs to be done to _____3_____ the anxieties of the country’s youth. The Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education had arranged for counsellors for students in junior colleges to _____4_____ exam-related stress. State government representatives had also asked students to not be ____5_____by adverse results and make use of the supplementary examinations. However, the loss of young lives speaks of serious systemic shortcomings that cannot be mitigated by reaching out to students just before the examinations Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 5
questions.explanation: A) 'Dejected' का use होगा क्योंकि "dejected" का अर्थ होता है निराश या हताश होना। यहाँ पर, सरकारी प्रतिनिधियों ने छात्रों से खराब परिणामों से निराश न होने की अपील की है, इसलिए 'dejected' यहाँ सही है। 'Unprotected' का अर्थ है सुरक्षा के बिना, 'Attached' का अर्थ है जुड़ा हुआ, और 'Approach' का अर्थ है तरीका या दृष्टिकोण, जो इस context में सही नहीं हैं। 'Dejected' will be used because it means feeling sad or disheartened. Here, the government representatives urged students not to be disheartened by adverse results, making 'dejected' the correct choice. Whereas, 'Unprotected' means without protection, 'Attached' means connected or joined, and 'Approach' means a way or method, none of which are suitable for this context.
